question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main chapters of the thesis (e.g., Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, Results, Conclusion). It only provides a project development plan (timeline) and the title of the current section.

question: Description
feedback: The text describes the problem statement and the relevance of the topic, but it does not provide a brief description of what each chapter/section of the thesis will contain.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis content is not visible. While the text explains the 'why' (relevance) and the 'when' (timeline), it fails to outline the 'how' (the logical flow of the thesis chapters).
